sourcesContent:
import { getVendorReviews, getVendorServices } from "./vendorUtils"; function VendorCard({ vendor, onContact, onSelectEvent }) { return (
{vendor.image && }

{vendor.name}

{vendor.description}

Contact: {vendor.contact}

Rating: {vendor.rating}/5

Price Range: {vendor.priceRange}

Services

    {getVendorServices(vendor).map((service, index) => (
  • {service}
    • ))}

User Reviews

{getVendorReviews(vendor).map((review, index) => (

{review.name} - {review.rating}/5

{review.comment}

))}
); } export default VendorCard;
